cards.back: A flexible and adaptive approach to software development that emphasizes individual and team autonomy, rapid delivery, and continuous improvement
Flexibility, Adaptability, Customer collaboration, Prioritization, Rapid delivery, Continuous improvement
Agility emphasizes predictability over certainty, whereas Traditional Project Management seeks certainty over predictability

cards.front: Role of the Product Owner in Agility
cards.back: To prioritize and define the product backlog, ensure customer satisfaction and make decisions on the work that needs to be done
Customer needs, Feedback, Change, Uncertainty, and Complexity
